## Entities.JournalLibrary.getJournalsForConfectionVersion() method

Gets all confection journal entries for a specific confection version (across all collections)

**Signature:**

```typescript
getJournalsForConfectionVersion(versionId: ConfectionVersionId): ReadonlyArray<AnyConfectionJournalEntry>;
```
